title: Rendlia nelsonii
taxonomy: Rendlia nelsonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant family. It belongs to the genus Rendlia, which is a group of succulent plants native to South Africa. This plant is often classified as a succulent, characterized by its thick, fleshy leaves that store water for survival in arid environments. Rendlia nelsonii is also known to be a low-growing, spreading plant with small, delicate flowers. As a member of the Aizoaceae family, Rendlia nelsonii is closely related to other succulent plants such as Lithops and Conophytum.
